root_cause: CNI configuration is missing on node
evidence: Recent sandbox/network setup event reports missing or uninitialized CNI config
Observed 2 recent CNI config-missing event(s) in the incident window
Pod is assigned to node worker-az1-17

causes.message: Kubelet is attempting to initialize Pod sandbox networking
Node CNI configuration is missing or not initialized
Pod sandbox creation cannot complete until a valid CNI network configuration is present

pod:checkout-api-6cb7f8f8c4-vj2hf: Pod sandbox creation is blocked because node CNI config is missing or uninitialized
Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "4b9d": no networks found in /etc/cni/net.d
node:worker-az1-17: Assigned node failed pod sandbox networking because CNI config was missing or uninitialized

likely_causes: CNI daemonset or bootstrap agent did not render config files into /etc/cni/net.d
Node bootstrapping completed before cluster networking configuration was installed
CNI config files were removed, corrupted, or mounted incorrectly on the node
A node-local networking agent crashed before initializing the default CNI network
suggested_checks: Check kubelet logs for missing /etc/cni/net.d configuration errors
Verify the CNI daemonset or bootstrap agent rendered config files on the node
Inspect /etc/cni/net.d on the affected node for a valid network config
